channel.title: Soft Skills on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Soft Skills on CEDIS

item.title: Teamwork and Soft Skills
item.description: The area of Teamwork and Soft Skills is an interdisciplinary field in project management and software development, emphasizing the importance of interpersonal and behavioral skills for the success of IT teams.

item.title: People
item.description: Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing with a focus on requirements, human aspects, and software engineering education.
